overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a grand medieval dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts' Great Hall. The scene features hundreds of floating candles illuminating long wooden house tables filled with students in dark robes, massive stained glass windows glowing with blue moonlight, and imposing stone Gothic architecture. The atmosphere is warm and magical, with candlelight flickering against the cool night visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the grand dining hall from a fixed position at eye level

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes seated at the nearest house table, engaged in conversation and dining
groups of students seated along the left side tables, eating and socializing

entered.detail: hundreds of magically suspended candles floating at varying heights, providing warm golden illumination throughout the hall
massive Gothic arched stained glass window depicting intricate designs, glowing with cool blue moonlight from outside
large cylindrical stone pillar with carved capital, supporting the high vaulted ceiling
long wooden banquet table with ornate house crest banner on the front, set with plates and food
medieval wall-mounted torch brackets with flickering flames casting light on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a magnificent Gothic great hall filled with floating candles and dining students. The camera captures the warm candlelight contrasting against the cool blue stained glass windows at the far end, while students in dark robes sit at long wooden house tables. Stone columns line the right side, and the atmosphere remains constant throughout the static shot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a magnificent Gothic great hall where warm candlelight contrasts with a cool nocturnal glow. It begins with a wide view of the space, capturing hundreds of floating candles that cast a flickering light over students in dark robes seated at long wooden house tables. As the eye lingers, the warmth of the interior illumination deepens against the backdrop of massive stained glass windows that radiate a soft blue moonlight from the far end of the room. The scene remains poised and atmospheric, with the imposing stone columns on the right framing the stillness of the magical gathering.
